positive: Cyberpunk portrait illustration of a solitary figure standing in a rainy Tokyo alleyway. The figure has glowing neon accents, chrome cybernetic enhancements, and dramatic reflections on wet pavement. Synthwave aesthetic, deep blues, magentas, and electric cyan glow.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural sunlight, soft colors, watercolor
